case_title: EDDIE L PRICE VS. CONNIE TRAN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY PRICE, EDDIE L AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN, CONNIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-28-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 55.00 SERVED JUN-14-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN, CONNIE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-28-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-28-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY VIETNAMESE INTERPRETER---LINH MUSFELT. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-28-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PRICE, EDDIE L RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRAN, CONNIE $2,650.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,715.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

PLAINTIFF PRESENT AND DEFENDANT PRESENT WITH SPECIALLY APPEARANCE COUNSEL MICHAEL RAIFSNIDER, ESQ.. BOTH PARTIES AGREED ON THE CONTINUANCE DATE. MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-30-2015 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 525

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF SEP-30-2015 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT AFFIRMED. THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF JULY 28, 2015 REMAINS THE SAME. THIS JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT PRICE, EDDIE L RECOVER FROM APPELLANT TRAN, CONNIE $2,650.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,715.00 PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-16-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Wednesday, September 30, 2015, in Department 525:
Eddie L. Price, Respondents/Plaintiffs appear as Propria Persona with witness Johnny Woods.
Michael Raifsnider, Esq., (415) 398-9001, Specially appearance for Appellant/Defendant Connie Tran who is also present.
Counsel request motion to have witness stays outside the courtroom until he is needed; Motion is granted and Mr. Woods steps outside of the courtroom until he is call as a witness.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.
Respondent/Plaintiff, Mr. Price testifies on his own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced: exhibit not marked - work license, home improvement contract, package pictures, Daly weather report, paint receipt.
Mr. Woods is call to come into the Court. Mr. Woods testifies on behalf of Mr. Price and responds to questions from the Court.

Mr. Raifsnider testifies on behalf of Connie Tran and responds to the questions from the Court and Connie Tran testifies on her own behalf under directions from her Counsel Raifsnider. The following documentary evidence is introduced: exhibit no marked - package exhibits - 3 weather reports, multiple pictures.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly evidence retained by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem David May; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-10-2015 Continued To Sep-30-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-28-2015 Judgment Entered
